commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates TUI optimistic submit handling so prompts render as pending run-keyed rows, history reloads preserve and reconcile those rows, Esc abort and session switches clear busy state, and focused TUI tests plus changelog are updated.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +109, Docs +1. Total +143 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sets pendingOptimisticUserMessage during send and abortActive does not clear it, so the linked stale-busy state follows from the code path. I did not execute tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: There is a narrow mechanical repair: clear the aborted run's pending user row and add one focused regression path.

target.title: Fix TUI Esc abort stale busy state
target.body:
## Summary

- Clear `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` after a successful TUI Esc abort, alongside `pendingChatRunId`.
- Render newly submitted prompts as pending user rows keyed by the generated run id so early same-session history reloads do not erase them.
- Preserve and reconcile pending user rows across history reloads, and clear them when switching sessions.

Fixes #86199

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts src/tui/components/chat-log.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: TUI Esc abort could clear the pending run id while leaving `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` set, causing the next prompt to be blocked as busy even though a second Esc reported `no active run`. During the earliest submit window, a same-session history reload could also erase the just-submitted prompt before the run id was fully bound.

Real environment tested: macOS arm64, Node v22.22.0, OpenClaw worktree `tui-contradicting-esc-pattern`, commit 6cbefa6f4a.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts src/tui/components/chat-log.test.ts
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
Test Files  3 passed (3)
     Tests  61 passed (61)
```

Observed result after fix: the regression coverage verifies that aborting a pending run clears both local busy-state fields, pending user prompts survive same-session history reloads when history has not committed them yet, and pending prompts reconcile to a single history-backed row once the submitted prompt appears in history.

What was not tested: no live interactive TUI PTY run was executed; coverage is focused unit coverage for the state transitions behind the stale busy lock and early prompt disappearance.
